query: SELECT t.id, t.name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tenant_roles tr WHERE tr.tenant_id = t.id) as role_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tenant_rubrics trb WHERE trb.tenant_id = t.id) as rubric_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tenant_call_types tct WHERE tct.tenant_id = t.id) as call_type_count FROM tenants t;
